_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Ce aboki, ka shiga.
speakFriend.description: An gina Liana Banyan don bude wa kowane harshe. Kowane harshe yana da lada ta fassara.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Jerin harsunan da kimar Marks na wucin-gadi ne. Marks alamun shiga ne, ba hannun jari ba.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Fassara Liana Banyan zuwa {{language}}. Samu Marks {{marks}} bayan karba.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Allon Barka da zuwa / Duniyar Ruhu
speakFriend.scopeCueCards: Babban saitin Katin Jagora (Dokokin Tattalin Arziki + Mulki)
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Lakabi na kewayawa da sakonnin kuskure
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Asalin harshe -- babu lada da ake bukata.
speakFriend.claimedBy: An yi ikrarin ladan ta @{{handle}} -- yana ci gaba.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Muryar Wanda Ya Kafa: Me Ya Sa Kalmomi Haka
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Kowace kalma a wannan dandalin an sanya mata suna da dalili. Asalin sunayen 26 mafi mahimmanci.
speakFriend.step1Body: Bude Ladan Fassara daga allon Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Fassara duk kirtani da ake bukata. Tura ta hanyar saiti na Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Bayan karba, kuna samun Marks kuma ana rikodin ku a IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Ce aboki, ka shiga."

languageSwitcher.tip: Yi amfani da kalmomin wucewar harshe daban-daban a Kofar Durin don bude kwarewa ta musamman!
